name: PurposeType
title: DRKS Purpose Type
description: Purpose type codes for DRKS-registered studies that are not covered by the standard HL7 research-study-prim-purp-type code system. To be used in combination with the standard code system.

concept.definition: The study aims to evaluate the expected course or outcome of a disease or condition.
The study aims to investigate the influence of individual genetic variation on drug response.
The study aims to investigate how the genome as a whole influences drug response and metabolism.
The study aims to evaluate the economic costs, benefits or cost-effectiveness of a health intervention or service.
The primary purpose of the study does not fit any of the defined categories.
